pi_items.source: MDPnP source code (/opt/openice/mdpnp/interop-lab/demo-devices/src/main/java/org/mdpnp/devices/simulation/multi/SimMultiparameter.java) generating MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE, MDC_PRESS_BLD_ART_ABP_SYS/DIA, and MDC_PULS_OXIM_SAT_O2
MDPnP source code (/opt/openice/mdpnp/interop-lab/demo-devices/src/main/java/org/mdpnp/devices/simulation/multi/SimMultiparameter.java) generating pleth, co2, i, ii, iii, and pressure waveforms

privileged_info_summary: The data is fully synthetic, generated mathematically at runtime by the open-source MDPnP simulation codebase. Code analysis confirms the expected device 'Multiparameter Monitor' is available as a simulated device and mathematically generates heart rate, blood pressure, and SpO2 numerics, along with 6 corresponding waveforms (pleth, ecg leads, pressure, co2), which satisfies the metadata claims.
